packageRules.description: Reactist releases should mirror @doist/product-libraries-tokens releases. Simple token value changes are categorized as patches.
Reactist releases should mirror @doist/product-libraries-tokens releases. When new tokens are added, we categorize it as a minor release.
Reactist releases should mirror @doist/product-libraries-tokens releases. Token removals are categorized as breaking changes and should be reviewed.
